title: PACIFIC HOUSE - 211info
text: TIDES OF CHANGE PACIFIC HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shelter with access to a community kitchen, play yard for children, living rooms, and a garden area. The shelter is located in a confidential location. 1902 2nd Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Age 18 and older or emancipated minors who are actively fleeing domestic violence or sexual assault Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 10am-4pm, Wednesday noon-4pm Email (503) 842-9486 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (503) 842-9486 Toll-free (800) 992-1679 Alternate (503) 852-9114 Text Only Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Tillamook County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 10am-4pm, Wednesday noon-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the corner of 2nd Street and Ivy Street in downtown Tillamook Services: Domestic Violence Shelters Sexual Assault Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TIDES OF CHANGE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
